question: How to install Packaging utility? How to install Packaging utility?
answer: To install Packaging Utility, you must have Internet access and Installation Manager installed. If Installation Manager is not installed, you must download the Packaging Utility files. The installer package for Packaging Utility is pu.offering.disk.platform_version.zip, which contains files for only one platform. You can install Packaging Utility and Installation Manager by running the install command using this package.

question: Why is the file db2jcc.jar missing after an upgrade to BPM V8.5.7 CF2016.12? After upgrading to IBM Business Process Manager V8.5.7 Cumulative Fix 2016.12, I have encountered several JDBC related exceptions during my process application development. It seems that the file db2jcc.jar was removed during the installation of the cumulative fix pack. What happened?
answer: The file "db2jcc.jar" is missing after an upgrade to BPM V8.5.7 CF2016.12 because it was likely removed during the installation of the cumulative fix pack, as mentioned in the error description. The problem can be fixed by upgrading IBM Data server driver for JDBC& SQLJ for DB2 on LUW to version 9.7 Fix Pack 7 or above.

question:
Why are the users unable to login to Web GUI 8.1 after I modify timeout to 2147483647 in security.xml file ? 

I followed the Web GUI 8.1 reference guide here to switching off the session timeout

http://www-01.ibm.com/support/knowledgecenter/SSSHTQ_8.1.0/com.ibm.netcool_OMNIbus.doc_8.1.0/webtop/wip/task/web_adm_settimeout.html

After I edited /config/cells/JazzSMNode01Cell/security.xml file, modified timeout setting to 2147483647, users are not able to login anymore.
answer: The users are unable to login to Web GUI 8.1 because the JavaScript call (settimeout) used in DASH is causing a condition that prevents a login when the timeout value is really big, specifically 2147483647, which is the maximum positive value for a 32-bit signed integer.

question:
Why is WebSphere MQ connection failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error? Why is WebSphere MQ connection failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error?
example client side error:com.ibm.mq.jmqi.JmqiException: CC=2;RC=2399;
 
AMQ9640: SSL invalid peer name, channel '?',
 
attribute 'OID.0.9.2342.19200300.100.1.3 (x2)'.
answer: The WebSphere MQ connection is failing when enabling SSL with AMQ9640 SSLPEER peer name error because the remote peer does not support certificate label configuration, and the local channel definition has a certificate label that the remote peer cannot understand. This results in an invalid peer name being sent over the SSL connection, causing the AMQ9640 error.

question: What is special about power windows?
answer: Power windows allow for movement of the windows with the push of a button. The driver door power window switch and the front passenger door power window switch have an Auto-Down feature, which allows the window to go down automatically when the switch is pushed downward past the detent and released.

question: Explain the steps how to do Schedule Recording while watching a program?
answer:
To perform Schedule Recording while watching a program:

1. Press the button while watching the program.
2. Display the program info window by pressing the Select button.
3. Use the left or right directional button to select a scheduled program.
4. Press the Select button again.
5. Select Schedule Recording from the menu.

This will set up a scheduled recording of the scheduled program.

question: Where do I find the list of my favorite channels?
answer: You can view and select channels on your Favorites lists by pressing the right directional button on your remote control, then selecting Favorites, and finally choosing the desired list among the five favorites lists on the screen.

question:
How to refresh a DataPower WebService Proxy which WSDL got changed? I have made changes to a WSDL stored in DP local filesystem.

How can I make the WSP reflect this change since DataPower Gateway 7.1.0 WebService Proxy WebGUI doesn't offer the "Refresh" button anymore?

Is there a best practice to refresh the WSP if I modified my WSDL?
answer:
To refresh a DataPower Web Service Proxy which WSDL got changed, you can disable and re-enable the service. This will cause the WSDL cache policy to be reapplied, reflecting any changes made to the local WSDL file.

Alternatively, as mentioned in [4], if the WSDL is hosted on the DataPower appliance (local:///), the WSDL Cache Policy does not apply, and you need to disable and re-enable the service to refresh the WSP.

question: how to set up Android Auto?
answer:
To set up Android Auto, follow these steps:

1. Download the Android Auto app from the Google Play store on your Android-powered smartphone.
2. Connect your Android-powered smartphone to one of the media USB ports in your vehicle.
3. If the Android Auto app was not downloaded, it will begin to download automatically when you plug in your device.

question:
We got a NullPointerException when bootstrapping the object store or accessing Site Preferences/Access Role on WorkplaceXT 

After logging into FileNet Workplace XT, a java.lang.NullPointerException error is logged when bootstrapping the object store or when accessing Site Preferences/Access Role.

Here's the error stack,

Error Stack Trace extracted from the J2EE Application Server error log:

java.lang.NullPointerException

at org.apache.jasper.runtime.JspWriterImpl.write(JspWriterImpl.java:42...(+462 chars)
answer: The problem is likely due to the "configurationDirectory" parameter in the web.xml file not being set correctly, causing a NullPointerException when trying to access the configuration files directory. To resolve this issue, you need to adjust the file system/network share permissions to allow access to the location identified as the "configurationDirectory".
